title: Putty and Texture
intro: Our putty products are premium surface preparation solutions designed to create smooth, even, and defect-free substrates for painting or finishing applications. They effectively fill minor cracks, surface imperfections, and uneven areas, ensuring a durable, uniform, and high-quality base that enhances the longevity, appearance, and performance of subsequent coatings across residential, commercial, and industrial projects.

products.name: Sikagard-694 F(I)
products.description: Sikagard-694 F(I) is a wall putty / texture solution from Ethios that creates smooth, even surfaces as a durable base for paint finishes. Contact our technical team for the data sheet and coverage details.
